The property

Where you'll stay.

Built for groups. Designed for nature.

A project by Vedbhoomi Eco Village

Accommodation

Total capacity: 22–28 guests across all room types.

Private stay

Cottages

Our cottages offer private rooms for pairs or small groups within your party. Balconies with garden and farm views, natural ventilation, and comfortable beds.

  • ✓ Private balcony with garden views
  • ✓ Natural cross-ventilation
  • ✓ Attached bathroom
  • ✓ Ideal for leaders, teachers, or seniors
Group bunks

Dormitories

Symmetrical dormitories with laterite-red walls, bunk beds, and ample storage. Built to create a group bonding atmosphere, perfect for student groups and youth teams.

  • ✓ Bunk bed setup for groups
  • ✓ Distinctive red laterite wall finish
  • ✓ Common areas for group gatherings
  • ✓ Shared bathrooms, well-maintained
Most unique

Treehouse

The treehouse is Mitraay's showpiece, a canopy stay surrounded by the farm, accessible via a stone-path walkway. Wake up to birdsong and mist.

  • ✓ Canopy-level platform
  • ✓ Stone-path entrance
  • ✓ Best sunrises on the property
  • ✓ Ideal for 2–4 guests

Amenities

WiFi across property

Free parking

Hot water in all rooms

Western washrooms

Indoor dining pavilion

Open pavilion with sound system

Karaoke on request

Large TV for screenings

Bonfire area

First aid on property

Photo Gallery

What's on the table

From this farm, to your plate.

Every meal at Mitraay is vegetarian: simple, sattvic, and made from what grows here. Rice from the paddy fields, vegetables from the kitchen garden, served fresh in the open dining pavilion.

We don't serve alcohol. What you get instead is silence, clean air, and food that genuinely comes from the land you're staying on.

Three meals a day included for all guests. Special dietary needs can be accommodated. Let us know in advance.

Come experience it

Ready to see it in person?

Send us your dates and group size and we'll confirm availability.

Check Availability
Mitraay

A purposeful farm retreat near Raigad Fort, Raigad, Maharashtra. Built for groups who want more than a getaway.

A project by Vedbhoomi Eco Village
